locator.quote: auto-scroll to the bottom whenever new entries arrive

text: The activity-log auto-scroll jumps to the bottom whenever new WebSocket entries arrive (default on).

locator.quote: auto-scroll should pause so they aren't yanked back to the bottom

text: When the user manually scrolls up to read history, auto-scroll pauses so they are not yanked back to the bottom; re-checking or scrolling to bottom re-enables it.
